name: Mortal Kombat
description: The original controversy. HP-based fighting tournament — last health standing wins the round.

tournament_modes.name: Best of 3 Rounds
tournament_modes.description: First player to win 2 rounds wins. Track HP — player at 0 loses round.

notes: SNES uses SNES9x RAM addresses with 0x7E bank prefix — strip to get actual offset
P1 health at 0x04B9, P2 at 0x04BB — confirmed via cheat codes
Blood code required for full experience: Down, Up, Left, Left, A, Right, Down
Rounds won counter address not in cheat file — derive from HP reaching 0
